TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sililasay(śúąÁúČ ) Itiniay i Shoufeng Cen no Hualien ko Sililasay a niyaro', 179 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 508 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 81% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 414 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 19% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 94 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis77%, Truku1%, Paiwan1%, roma2%.
S.PHON: si…ĺi…ĺasaj(** ) itiniaj i sńßo~uo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u si…ĺi…ĺasaj a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Sililasay(śúąÁúČ ) Itiniay i Shoufeng Cen no Hualien ko Sililasay a niyaro', 179 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 508 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 81% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 414 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 19% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 94 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis77%, Truku1%, Paiwan1%, roma2%.
S.PHON: si…ĺi…ĺasaj(** ) itiniaj i sńßo~uo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u si…ĺi…ĺasaj a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%.
